hooks.command: $env:PATH += ';C:\Program Files\Git\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd'; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; git fetch origin 2>&1 | Out-Null; $s = (git status 2>&1 | Out-String).Trim(); $l = (git log --oneline -5 2>&1 | Out-String).Trim(); $ctx = "[Session Start] Git Status:`n" + $s + "`n`n[Recent Commits]`n" + $l; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='SessionStart';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 3
